Types

DotfileConfig = object
  defaultProfile*: string
  profiles*: Table[string, ProfileConfig]
Source   Edit   
ProfileConfig = object
  provider*: string
  model*: string
  apiKeyEnv*: string
  baseUrl*: string
  reasoningEffort*: string
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc loadDotfileConfig(): DotfileConfig {....raises: [],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, ReadDirEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Load config from ~/.typos/config.json. Returns empty default if missing. Source   Edit   
proc loadProjectConfig(): DotfileConfig {....raises: [OSError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Load config from .typos.json in cwd. Returns empty default if missing. Source   Edit   
proc mergeConfigs(dotfile, project: DotfileConfig): DotfileConfig {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Merge two configs, project overrides dotfile at the profile level. Source   Edit   
proc parseDotfileConfig(jsonStr: string): DotfileConfig {.
    ...raises: [IOError, OSError, JsonParsingError, ValueError, KeyError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Parse a JSON string into a DotfileConfig. Source   Edit   
proc resolveProfile(config: DotfileConfig; profileName: string): ProfileConfig {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Look up named profile, fall back to defaultProfile, fall back to empty. Source   Edit
